untranslatable_reason: Bowl pattern requires multi-phase geometric analysis: (1) identifying narrow-range lead-in phase via trend line construction, (2) detecting 45-60° downtrend slope in bump phase, (3) measuring lead-in height as vertical distance from trend line to daily low, (4) calculating target as multiple of lead-in height. These require custom pattern recognition and trend line geometry not available in allowed indicators. Approximation used narrow bandwidth + upward break, but true bowl detection requires candlestick pattern analysis and manual trend line drawing.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: narrow consolidation (bb_bandwidth < 0.02) followed by upward close. True bowl pattern requires: (a) trend line construction for slope measurement, (b) phase identification across multiple bars, (c) geometric height calculations. Recommend custom pattern detector for this Bulkowski formation or manual chart review.
